known_gaps: The full design workflow currently stops at component selection because verified/rule-inferred selections are missing for 1210 bulk/DC-blocking capacitors and 0.47-ohm 1206 emitter resistors.

The lower-level Class AB headphone lane emits clean local-route contact evidence and partial route-tree/contact evidence, but full VCC and LOAD_REF route completion still has blocked route/contact graph branches.

Real KiCad ERC/DRC promotion remains expected-fail until component selection reaches schematic/PCB generation, the partial route-tree blockers are repaired, and kicad_checks reaches clean evidence with configured kicad-cli.

Output protection remains connectivity-level: fault_protection_status is placeholder_blocked and active fault protection, thermal bias validation, quiescent current adjustment, and simulation evidence are not implemented.

Amplifier output transistor evidence remains warning-only for fabrication promotion: power dissipation, thermal review, safe operating area, and bias-diode thermal placement evidence are still review_required.
notes: KiCad-backed Class AB headphone amplifier fixture for the first generated amplifier PCB promotion lane. This fixture is intentionally expected_fail until component catalog coverage, remaining route/contact graph blockers, and real KiCad ERC/DRC evidence are closed.
